mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(version_id), 0) + 1 FROM file_versions
INSERT INTO file_versions ( version_id, file_id, version_number, file_path, file_size, uploader, uploaded_at, saved_name ) VALUES ( #{versionId}, #{fileId}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(version_number), 0) + 1 FROM file_versions WHERE file_id = #{fileId}), #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{uploader}, SYSDATE + 9/24, #{savedName} )
